---
title: "Preface"
---

## Why this book exists

Creel analysis often sits between field operations, messy data, and annual reporting deadlines. This book is intended to make that work more explicit, more reproducible, and easier to review.

## What this book is not

It is not a package reference manual, a survey sampling textbook, or a broad fisheries methods handbook. It is a methods-first guide to the creel problems that `tidycreel` is meant to support.

## Working convention

Throughout the book, each chapter distinguishes among:

- conceptual guidance
- current `tidycreel` support
- partial support
- manual workflow steps
- future development opportunities
